zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Norreys於1425年出生在英國英格蘭爾因斯時，她的父親Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke39歲，母親Elizabeth Harington27歲。她於1448年與Sir Thomas Gerard結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1470年享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Norreys于1425年出生在英国英格兰爾因斯时，她的父亲Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke39岁，母亲Elizabeth Harington27岁。她于1448年与Sir Thomas Gerard结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1470年享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Norreys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Norris
meanings: habitational name from Middle English norreis, noreis, norais ‘northerner’ (Anglo-Norman French noreis), used both of Norwegians and of inhabitants of northern England and Scotland.
from the Middle English personal name Norreis, derived from norreis ‘northerner’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Norreys was born in 1425, in Ince, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke, was 39 and her mother, Elizabeth Harington, was 27. She married Sir Thomas Gerard in 1448. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1470, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Norreys est née en 1425, à Ince, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Harington, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Gerard en 1448. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1470, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Norreys 1425 in Ince, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke 39 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Harington 27. Sie hat 1448 Sir Thomas Gerard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1470 im Alter von 45 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Norreys è nata il nel 1425 nel Ince, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Harington, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Gerard nel 1448. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1470, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Norreysが1425年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアインスで生まれた時，父Sir William Le Norreys Of Spekeは39歳，母Elizabeth Haringtonは27歳であった。1448年にSir Thomas Gerardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1470年に45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Norreys(이)가 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 인스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Harington(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1448년 Sir Thomas Gerard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Norreys nasceu em 1425, em Ince, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Harington, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Gerard em 1448. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1470, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Norreys родилась в 1425 г. в местности инц, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Harington, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Gerard в 1448 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1470 г. в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Norreys nació en 1425, en Ince, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Harington, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Gerard en 1448. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1470, a la edad de 45 años.
